data.title: Sanrio's Stock Expected to Surge Following Strong Earnings Report
data.description: Sanrio, the Japanese company known for Hello Kitty, is anticipated to reach its daily trading limit on Friday. Bloomberg posted on X that this follows the company's announcement of better-than-expected earnings and an upward revision of its full-year guidance. The positive financial results have sparked investor interest, leading to a potential surge in the company's stock value. Sanrio's performance highlights its strong market position and the enduring popularity of its iconic character, Hello Kitty.

data.title: Coinbase announces $39 million increase in Bitcoin holdings
data.description: According to Bitcoin Magazine, Coinbase disclosed that it has increased its Bitcoin holdings by $39 million through regular weekly purchases.

data.title: South Korea's FSS Exempts VASPs from Penalties for Reporting Market Manipulation
data.description: The Financial Supervisory Service (FSS) in South Korea has issued a no-action letter that exempts virtual asset service providers (VASPs) from certain penalties under the Credit Information Act. According to NS3.AI, this exemption is applicable when VASPs report suspected market manipulation or unfair trading to the Financial Services Commission (FSC) or FSS, or when they provide investigative data. The letter ensures that these exchanges are protected from legal consequences, provided their actions adhere to the specified guidance.

data.title: Yuan's Strength Against Rupee May Persist Amid Divergent Currency Policies
data.description:
The yuan's recent appreciation against the rupee is expected to continue, driven by differing currency management strategies in India and China, analysts suggest. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the contrasting approaches of the two nations in handling their currencies.

China's currency policy has been more supportive of the yuan, while India's approach has been less aggressive in defending the rupee. This divergence is contributing to the yuan's ongoing strength against the Indian currency.

Analysts believe that unless there is a significant shift in policy from either country, the yuan may maintain its upward trajectory against the rupee. The situation underscores the broader economic strategies of both nations as they navigate global financial markets.

data.title: A whale that had accumulated 105,000 ETH in long positions added 3,000 ETH five hours ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a group of long positions that had accumulated 105,000 ETH have added 3,000 ETH to their positions. Five hours ago, they added 3,000 ETH at $1919, bringing the total long position at a single address back to 60,000 ETH. The two addresses now hold a total of 105,000 ETH, worth $204 million, with a floating loss of $10.229 million. Address 0xa5B…01D41: holding 60,000 ETH ($116 million), opening price $2,048.9, floating loss $6.36 million; Address 0x6C8…D84F6: holding 45,000 ETH ($87.34 million), opening price $2,029.38, floating loss $3.869 million.

data.title: Ethereum Whale Increases Holdings Amid Price Drop
data.description:
On February 13, a significant Ethereum investor increased their holdings as the cryptocurrency's price fell below $2,000. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the whale added 3,000 ETH to their position at an average price of $1,919. The investor now holds a total of 105,000 ETH across two addresses.

The first address, 0xa5B…01D41, contains 60,000 ETH, acquired at an opening price of $2,048.9, resulting in an unrealized loss of $6.36 million. The second address, 0x6C8…D84F6, holds 45,000 ETH, purchased at $2,029.38, with an unrealized loss of $3.869 million.

Despite the current market conditions, the whale's total holdings are valued at $204 million, with a floating loss of $10.229 million.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Experiences Significant Net Outflow
data.description: According to data from SoSoValue, on February 12 (Eastern Time), the XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $6.424 million. According to Odaily, the Canary XRP ETF (XRPC) recorded a net inflow of $1.4449 million on the same day, bringing its historical total net inflow to $413 million. Meanwhile, the Grayscale XRP Trust ETF (GXRP) experienced a net outflow of $8.9104 million, with its historical total net inflow reaching $131 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF stands at $971 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.18%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.224 billion.

data.title: Hong Kong Semiconductor Stocks Surge in Early Trading
data.description: Hong Kong's semiconductor stocks experienced a notable rise in early trading. According to Jin10, TianShu Intelligence (09903.HK) saw an increase of over 7.5%, while ASML Holding (00600.HK) rose by more than 6%. Additionally, GigaDevice Semiconductor (03986.HK) climbed over 3%, and both Montage Technology (06809.HK) and SMIC (00981.HK) gained more than 1%. This upward trend reflects positive investor sentiment in the semiconductor sector.

data.title: Germany's Merz Advocates for Comprehensive Deregulation
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. Friedrich Merz, a prominent German politician, has called for extensive deregulation across all sectors in Germany. Merz emphasized the need for a 'regulatory clean slate,' suggesting that minor corrections to existing laws are insufficient to address the current challenges. His remarks highlight a push for significant policy changes aimed at reducing bureaucratic hurdles and fostering economic growth. Merz's proposal reflects ongoing debates within Germany about the balance between regulation and economic freedom.

data.title: Crypto stocks closed lower across the board in the US market, with Coinbase (COIN) falling more than 7.9%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.34%, the S&P 500 fell 1.57%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 2.03%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally declined, with UPXI down 8.91%, HOOD down 8.79%, Coinbase down 7.9%, BNB Network down 5.49%, and ALT5 Sigma down 4.7%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: JPMorgan Lowers Bitcoin Production Cost Estimate Amid Hashrate Decline
data.description: JPMorgan has revised its Bitcoin production cost estimate from $90,000 to $77,000, citing a notable decrease in network hashrate and mining difficulty. According to NS3.AI, this year's drop in mining difficulty is the most significant since China's mining ban in 2021, with a 15% decline. Despite the reduced production cost, JPMorgan maintains a positive outlook on Bitcoin, setting a long-term price target of $266,000.

data.title: ARK Invest increased its holdings in Robinhood, Bitmine, and Bullish yesterday, totaling approximately $18.97 million.
data.description: According to data from Ark Invest Tracker, Cathie Wood's ARK Invest increased its holdings on February 12 by 174,677 shares of Robinhood stock (approximately $12.42 million), 212,314 shares of Bitmine stock (approximately $4.19 million), and 74,323 shares of Bullish stock (approximately $2.36 million), for a total value of approximately $18.97 million.

data.title: Crypto Trading Strategy: Timing the Market Amid Volatility
data.description: Crypto KOL Murphy posted on X, expressing a perspective on trading strategies in the cryptocurrency market. According to Murphy, setting aside public opinion and personal biases, it is not incorrect to sell during periods of high liquidity and buy during times of market panic. Murphy suggests that such strategies are purely transactional and should not be criticized without valid reasons.

data.title: Thailand's Election Outcome Expected to Boost Markets
data.description: Thailand's major financial institutions anticipate a positive impact on markets following the election victory of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that Charnvirakul's strategies to draw foreign investment and enhance consumer support are seen as beneficial for the country's economic landscape. Analysts believe these policies could lead to increased investor confidence and market stability, fostering a favorable environment for economic growth. The focus on attracting international capital and bolstering domestic consumption is expected to play a crucial role in Thailand's financial development.

data.title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark for Real-Time Coding
data.description: On February 13, OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark research preview, a streamlined version of GPT-5.3-Codex. According to BlockBeats, this marks OpenAI's first model specifically designed for real-time coding, enabling targeted editing, logic restructuring, and interface optimization with immediate result viewing. Codex-Spark is optimized for ultra-low latency hardware, delivering nearly instantaneous responses, capable of processing over 1,000 tokens per second while effectively handling practical coding tasks.

data.title: Solana Foundation Highlights Importance of Asia-Pacific Market
data.description: On February 13, Yu Lin, the Asia-Pacific head of the Solana Foundation, emphasized the significance of the Asia-Pacific market during the Consensus Hong Kong conference. According to BlockBeats, Lin expressed confidence that the Solana Foundation's technology, ecosystem, and partners can leverage blockchain technology to introduce products to the global market in a compliant and secure manner.

data.title: Sharplink Chairman: Will continue to purchase and pledge ETH
data.description: During a panel discussion at Consensus Conference 2026 in Hong Kong, Sharplink Chairman Joe Lubin and CEO Joseph Chalom stated that Digital Asset Vaults (DATs) are evolving into a unique institutional strategy. Lubin pointed out that ETH is a productive asset that can generate approximately 3% yield through staking. Sharplink has staked almost all of its holdings and plans to continue purchasing and staking ETH. Chalom stated that Sharplink's strategy is to deploy perpetual capital to seek risk-adjusted returns for investors through "good institutional DeFi," rather than pursuing venture capital-style returns. He mentioned that BlackRock plans to tokenize its $14 trillion in assets, with over 65% on Ethereum. Lubin predicts that in the future, every company will become a blockchain company and hold tokens on its balance sheet.

data.title: CEO Sentenced to 20 Years for $200 Million Bitcoin Ponzi Scheme
data.description: Ramil Ventura Palafox, CEO of Praetorian Group International, has been sentenced to 20 years in prison for orchestrating a $200 million Bitcoin Ponzi scheme. According to NS3.AI, Palafox promised investors daily returns ranging from 0.5% to 3%, but the fraudulent operation resulted in a net loss of $62.69 million. Reports indicate that misappropriated funds were used for luxury purchases, including homes and supercars.

data.title: Coinbase will focus its investments this year on three main areas: developing a full-fledged trading platform, expanding stablecoin payments, and bringing the world's blockchain to the forefront.
data.description: In its letter to shareholders, Coinbase stated that in 2026 it will focus its investments on three key priorities: Developing a comprehensive trading platform: Expanding Coinbase into the only trusted platform for customers to trade all types of assets (cryptocurrencies, derivatives, stocks, and prediction markets), helping customers manage more portfolios and deepen engagement. Expanding stablecoins and payments: Accelerating the utility of USDC and the payment technology stack (APIs, wallets, and merchant channels) to make value transfer faster, cheaper, and easier, and seizing the next wave of opportunities. The wave of real-world applications beyond trading. Bringing the world on-chain: Expanding the Base app by increasing DeFi integration within the Coinbase app and focusing more on trading, making the on-chain experience simpler and more accessible. Coinbase's infrastructure continues to drive the growth of the Base platform's activity, so increased usage also depends on Coinbase's infrastructure.

data.title: OKX announces the launch of CC (Canton).
data.description: OKX China posted on the X platform that OKX launched CC (Canton) on February 12 and trading is now open.
